scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/shared && npm run build --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/api && npm run build --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/shared && npm run test --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/api && npm run test --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/api && npm run lint --workspace @k8s-ai-mvp/web
